Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

(8 comments)

This function is only getting scarier.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

It looks like the change goes through a lot of effort to copy the interface names from the lnet_ni before dropping the lnet_net_lock. But the lnet_net::ni_interfaces[] array is assigned when a ni is first initialized and immutable after that. The copying of the names is therefore not needed.

In LNetDist(), the lnet_net_lock protects against changes of the_lnet.ln_nis. In particular once the lnet_net_lock has been dropped the lnet_ni can be moved to the_lnet.ln_nis_zombie or even deallocated altogether. Taking a reference on the lnet_ni with lnet_ni_addref_locked() will protect against the latter but not the former.

Taking the_lnet.ln_api_mutex does protect against the_lnet.ln_nis being changed, because all DLC calls that can change the list use it.

On the other hand, if you're willing to assume that 'up' and 'addr' do not change for an lnet_ni after it has been created, then you could move this check to (for example) lnet_startup_lndni() and cache the result in the lnet_ni for use in LNetDist().

Patch Set 7:

Note that if you do place the test in lnet_startup_lndni() it must come after the (lnd->lnd_startup)(ni) call, because that's where the IP address gets added into lnet_ni::ni_nid.

Patch Set 7:

Hi Olaf,

Thanks for your input, and the detailed explanations.
I think I will completely change the way I check ni's usability. I will get a reference on current net namespace in lnet_startup_lndni(), store it in a new field in net_ni, and compare it with current net namespace in LNetDist().

Patch Set 7:

New patch is at http://review.whamcloud.com/21884
Abandoned

parents.subject: LU-7988 hsm: remove hsd.request_sz from struct hsm_scan_data

commit.subject: LU-8392 lnet: no lnet_net_lock for address visibility check
commit.message:
LU-8392 lnet: no lnet_net_lock for address visibility check

Do not hold lnet_net_lock when checking address visibility in
LNetDist() with lnet_ipif_query().

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I5ade4a5ad96a4bc91d078dd3d3f6f3ab45934e8f
